summary: #99607 is the canonical repair path, but it is not merge-ready. The hydrated artifact shows an open, non-security-sensitive, maintainer-editable PR with useful Bedrock live-smoke work; current main is f41e3b14d2ab5acd6329e12b5cb9325e1d72c294. The PR needs repair before merge because the artifact still reports package paths under packages/llm-runtime while current main uses packages/ai, QA Smoke CI is failing, and the latest Codex review evidence is stale relative to head bf1f796c838532c82604eb419bb91c93cc74c9cb.

actions.reason: Repair the maintainer-editable contributor branch before any merge recommendation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #99607 on the contributor branch so the Bedrock Gateway live-smoke harness changes apply cleanly to current main before external merge preflight. Retarget the API registry provider-sharing work from packages/llm-runtime to the current packages/ai package, keep the Bedrock live-smoke harness behavior narrow, address the failing QA Smoke CI or prove it unrelated, then rerun exact-head checks and Codex review before merge.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix: keep Bedrock live smoke on Bedrock runtime
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves
Repairs #99607 so the Bedrock Gateway live-smoke harness work applies to current main and can go through exact-head merge preflight.

## Why This Change Was Made
The PR is useful and maintainer-editable, but current main has the LLM runtime registry under `packages/ai` while the hydrated PR file list still points at `packages/llm-runtime`. The repair should retarget that registry change, keep explicit Bedrock fallback candidates on the Bedrock Converse runtime, and preserve the temporary Bedrock provider config/region behavior described by the source PR.

## User Impact
Maintainers running explicit Bedrock Gateway live smokes can validate the Bedrock runtime path instead of failing in harness setup. This remains a live-smoke/test enabler, not a general product changelog item.

## Evidence
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/99607 by @brian-bell.
- Current main: f41e3b14d2ab5acd6329e12b5cb9325e1d72c294.
- Required repair: retarget `packages/llm-runtime` registry changes to `packages/ai`, resolve QA Smoke CI, then run `pnpm check:changed` and focused registry/gateway live-harness tests.
- Executor must run fresh Codex `/review` and exact-head merge preflight before any merge.
credit_notes: Preserve @brian-bell's authorship and contributor credit on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/99607.
Because maintainer_can_modify=true, prefer repairing the existing PR branch instead of replacing it.
